[14:13] And there came one that had escaped, and told Abram the Hebrew; for he dwelt in the plain of Mamre the Amorite, brother of Eshcol, and brother of Aner: and these were confederate with Abram. [14:14] And when Abram heard that his brother was taken captive, he armed his trained servants, born in his own house, three hundred and eighteen, and pursued them unto Dan. ⭐[14:15] And he divided himself against them, he and his servants, by night, and smote them, and pursued them unto Hobah, which is on the left hand of Damascus. [14:16] And he brought back all the goods, and also brought again his brother Lot, and his goods, and the women also, and the people. [14:17] And the king of Sodom went out to meet him after his return from the slaughter of Chedorlaomer, and of the kings that were with him, at the valley of Shaveh, which is the king’s dale. [14:18] And Melchizedek king of Salem brought forth bread and wine: and he was the priest of the most high God.
ed: A city in Syria.
cd: 大馬士革，位於敘利亞的一座城市。
ex: Damascus 是位於敘利亞的一座古城。在聖經中提到的哈伯（Hobah）是 Damascus 左邊的地方。
